name: covid19-api.com
prose:
# COVID-19 data API API

## Getting started

The COVID-19 data API API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://api.example.com`.

## Authentication

No authentication is required to call this API.

## API reference

### GET /country
getLatestCountryDataByName
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `name`, `format`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /country/all
getLatestAllCountries
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `format`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /country/code
getLatestCountryDataByCode
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `code`, `format`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /help/countries
getListOfCountries
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `format`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /report/country/all
getDailyReportAllCountries
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `date`, `date-format`, `format`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

Returns a list of records.

Returns a list of records.

Returns a list of records.
